headline: 4 Oilfield Services Stocks Set to Gain From Strong Industry Tailwinds
summary: Low reliance on debt should enable oilfield service companies to access capital on favorable terms in a volatile business environment, underpinning a promising outlook for the Zacks Oil and Gas- Field Services industry. HAL, BKR, FTI and AROC are well poised to gain.

headline: ReconAfrica begins testing at Namibia discovery, advances Gabon work program
summary: Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd (TSX-V:RECO, OTCQX:RECAF, FRA:0XD) said on Thursday it has begun production testing at its Kavango West 1X discovery well in Namibia, while advancing seismic work and appraisal planning on its offshore Ngulu block in Gabon as part of a catalyst-rich 2026...

headline: Halliburton (HAL) Is Up 6.7% After First Fully Automated Offshore Well in Guyana - What's Changed
summary: In March 2026, Halliburton, together with ExxonMobil, Sekal, Noble and the Wells Alliance Guyana team, delivered the industry’s first fully automated geological well placement with complete rig automation in offshore Guyana, using LOGIX orchestration, EarthStar ultra-deep resistivity and Sekal’s DrillTronics in an integrated closed-loop system. This project showed how unifying subsurface interpretation, rig automation and real-time optimization can materially improve execution efficiency,...

headline: ReconAfrica Commences Production Testing Operations at Kavango West Discovery and Provides an Operational Update
summary: CALGARY, Alberta, March 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd. (the “Company”, “ReconAfrica”) (TSXV: RECO) (OTCQX: RECAF) (Frankfurt: 0XD) (NSX: REC) is pleased to provide an update of its operations in Namibia and Gabon.
